items.title: El Nino effect: Centre says 111 districts with ‘poor irrigation facilities’ are a concern
items.summary: The Centre has assessed that 315 districts are vulnerable and 111 districts in 12 States are of primary concern due to poor irrigation facilities
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Massive fire rips through Indonesia sandal factory
items.summary: A massive fire destroyed a sandal factory in Tangerang, Indonesia, after it spread to a gas storage area.
